languages.text: "Это, Лорд-капитан, то, что питает всю местную машинерию. Душа ее, можно сказать, самое божественное, что в ней есть. Энергию излучает и светится так, что глазам больно, а формы примерно вот такой." {n}Руки бригадира обрисовывают в воздухе объемистый конус с усеченным верхом.{/n} "Из-за него Альва-9 больше всего злилась".

traits.locale_text: "Это, Лорд-капитан, то, что питает всю машину. Душа ее, можно сказать, самое божественное, что в ней есть. Светится так, что глазам больно, а формы примерно вот такой." {n}Руки бригадира обрисовывают в воздухе объемистый конус с усеченным верхом.{/n} "Из-за него Альва-9 больше всего злилась".

languages.text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."
languages.original_text: "Это, Лорд-капитан, то, что питает всю местную машинерию. Душа ее, можно сказать, самое божественное, что в ней есть. Энергию излучает и светится так, что глазам больно, а формы примерно вот такой." {n}Руки бригадира обрисовывают в воздухе объемистый конус с усеченным верхом.{/n} "Из-за него Альва-9 больше всего злилась".

traits.locale_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

"That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

"That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

languages.text: 「それが、この機械を動かすエネルギーです。魂とも言える、この機械の中で最も神聖なものです。エネルギーを放ち、光り輝き、目を痛めるほどです。形は、こうです。」{n}大工長は、大きな円錐形のものを空中に描きます。{/n}「アルバ9は、この形に激怒しました。」
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

traits.locale_text: 「それが、この機械を動かすエネルギーです。魂とも言える、この機械の中で最も神聖なものです。エネルギーを放ち、光り輝き、目を痛めるほどです。形は、こうです。」{n}作業 foremanは、大きな円錐形のものを空中に描きます。{n}「アルバ9は、この形に激怒しました。」

languages.text: "O, buradaki tüm makinelere güç veren şeydir Lord Kaptan. Ruh ya da buradaki en ilahi şey diyebilirsiniz. Enerji yayar ve o kadar parlaktır ki gözlerinizi acıtır, şekli de şöyledir." {n}Ustabaşının elleri; havada tepesi kesik, büyükçe bir koni şekli çiziyor.{/n} "Alva-9'un asıl öfkelendiği şey de buydu."
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

traits.locale_text: "O, buradaki tüm makinelere güç veren şeydir Lord Kaptan. Ruh ya da buradaki en ilahi şey diyebilirsiniz. Enerji yayar ve o kadar parlaktır ki gözlerinizi acıtır, şekli de şöyledir." {n}Ustabaşının elleri; havada tepesi kesik, büyükçe bir koni şekli çiziyor.{/n} "Alva-9'un asıl öfkelendiği şey de buydu."

languages.text: «Pues eso, Lord Capitán, es lo que suministra energía a toda la maquinaria. Se podría decir que es su alma, el aspecto más divino de su composición. Irradia energía y brilla con tanta intensidad que hace daño a los ojos, y tiene más o menos esta forma». {n}Las manos del capataz trazan en el aire la silueta de un cono de tamaño considerable con la parte superior seccionada.{/n} «Es lo que hizo que Alva-9 montase en cólera».
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

traits.locale_text: «Pues eso, Lord Capitán, es lo que suministra energía a toda la maquinaria. Se podría decir que es su alma, el aspecto más divino de su composición. Irradia energía y brilla con tanta intensidad que hace daño a los ojos, y tiene más o menos esta forma». {n}Las manos del capataz trazan en el aire la silueta de un cono de tamaño considerable con la parte superior seccionada.{/n} «Es lo que hizo que Alva-9 montase en cólera».

languages.text: “舰长大人，那是为这里的所有机械供能的核心。可以说是这里的灵魂，最神圣的部分。它能释放能量，光芒亮得刺眼，形状大概是这样——”{n}工头双手在空中比划出一个顶部平切的大型圆锥体。{/n}“阿尔瓦-9就是为这东西大发雷霆。”
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，那是为这里的所有机械供能的核心。可以说是这里的灵魂，最神圣的部分。它能释放能量，光芒亮得刺眼，形状大概是这样——”{n}工头双手在空中比划出一个顶部平切的大型圆锥体。{/n}“阿尔瓦-9就是为这东西大发雷霆。”

languages.text: « Ni plus ni moins que la source d'énergie qui alimente toute la machinerie de la station, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Son âme, pour ainsi dire, et sa composante la plus sacrée. Le noyau produit une énergie telle qu'il en émane un éclat proprement aveuglant, et il ressemble à peu de choses près à ceci. » {n}D'un geste de la main, le contremaître esquisse dans le vide la silhouette d'un cône de belle taille au sommet tronqué.{/n} « Voilà ce qui suscite tant de colère de la part d'Alva-9. »
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it. It gives off energy and glows so bright it hurts your eyes, and it's shaped something like this." {n}The foreman's hands trace in the air the shape of a sizeable cone with a truncated top.{/n} "That's what Alva-9 got really angry about."

traits.locale_text: « Ni plus ni moins que la source d'énergie qui alimente toute la machinerie de la station, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Son âme, pour ainsi dire, et sa composante la plus sacrée. Le noyau produit une énergie telle qu'il en émane un éclat proprement aveuglant, et il ressemble à peu de choses près à ceci. » {n}D'un geste de la main, le contremaître esquisse dans le vide la silhouette d'un cône de belle taille au sommet tronqué.{/n} « Voilà ce qui suscite tant de colère de la part d'Alva-9. »

languages.text: "Er, Lord Captain, treibt alle Maschinen hier an. Man könnte sagen, er ist ihre Seele, ihr göttlicher Funke. Er gibt Energie ab, strahlt so hell, dass die Augen schmerzen und ist etwa so geformt." {n}Der Vorarbeiter zeichnet mit seinen Händen einen abgeflachten Kegel in die Luft.{/n} "Das war es, was Alva-9 richtig verärgert hat."
languages.original_text: "That, Lord Captain, is what powers all the machinery here. Its soul, you might say, the most divine thing in it.
